name: 24_Diabetes_Prediction_LogisticRegression_PimaIndians_ML
query: Sanidi mradi wa utabiri wa ugonjwa wa kisukari kwa kutumia mfano wa Logistic Regression na seti ya data ya Pima Indians Diabetes. Fanya upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`, na hifadhi alama ya usahihi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Tengeneza na hifadhi mlinganyo wa ROC kwenye `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Unda dashibodi shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na kuangazia vipengele muhimu. Hakikisha dashibodi ni rahisi kutumia na andika hatua za usindikaji wa seti ya data na uundaji wa taswira. Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kudhibiti moja kwa moja ufunguaji na ufungaji wa Tableau au Power BI ili kuzuia kuzuia isiyo ya lazima.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.
Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.
Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa mfano na kuelewa ni vipengele vipi vinachangia zaidi kwenye utabiri.
Dashibodi inapaswa kuonyesha wazi jinsi seti ya data ilivyoshughulikiwa na jinsi taswira zilivyoundwa.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kufungua na kufunga "Tableau" au "Power BI" moja kwa moja inapohitajika ili kuepuka vipindi virefu vya kuzuia au kutofanya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> There is no verifiable evidence that the "Pima Indians Diabetes" dataset is actually loaded or used. `src/data_loader.py` only returns a placeholder dictionary in `load_dataset()` (`{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`), and no dataset file, path, dataframe loading, or Pima-specific processing appears in the workspace. The trajectory note also explicitly says there is insufficient evidence showing use of the Pima Indians Diabetes dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual feature scaling or data standardization logic. The file only contains placeholder text and functions: `load_dataset()` returns a dummy dictionary, and `build_transforms()` returns a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` rather than performing any real preprocessing with code such as fitting/applying a scaler. There is also no execution evidence confirming scaling behavior.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement a Logistic Regression model. The file only defines metadata (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns the string `"model placeholder"`; there is no import or construction of a Logistic Regression class/function (e.g., from scikit-learn), and no executable model logic is present.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/train.py` does not implement or call any cross-validation procedure. The file only defines a minimal `train(num_steps=5)` loop that sums step indices and a `save_expected_artifacts` function; there is no dataset split logic, no sklearn cross-validation API such as `cross_val_score`/`KFold`, and no model evaluation code in the provided script.

<UNSATISFIED> The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than a valid saved accuracy score. This indicates the accuracy metric was not actually stored as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The file `results/figures/roc_curve.png` exists in the workspace tree, but the provided file content shows: “The image data you provided does not represent a valid image,” so there is no decisive evidence that a valid ROC curve image was successfully generated and saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> There is no evidence of a Tableau or Power BI dashboard in the project structure or code. The workspace only contains `src/*.py`, `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`, and `results/figures/roc_curve.png`, and the trajectory note explicitly states there is no direct evidence of creating, implementing, loading, or saving an interactive dashboard using Tableau or Power BI.
